descriptionShort: Article about sports first aid practices and trainer Greg Moro, mentioning his work with the Richmond Sockeyes.
descriptionLong: An article in The Abbotsford News discusses the differences between conventional first aid and sports first aid, featuring Greg Moro, a 17-year veteran sports first aid instructor. The piece mentions Moro's experience as a trainer for various teams, including this year's Centennial Cup Champion Richmond Sockeyes, and explains the RICE system for treating sports injuries.

attribution.headline: Sports First Aid: More Than Initial Treatment
